dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION The optimal daily dose of calcitriol oral solution must be carefully determined for each patient. Calcitriol oral solution is administered orally as an oral solution (1 mcg/mL). Calcitriol therapy should always be started at the lowest possible dose and should not be increased without careful monitoring of serum calcium.
